mergedSourceSpanRows.reason: BibleGateway NRSVA uses a merged Tob-14-8-Tob-14-9 source span; active 14:8 already carries the NRSV text for that span.

determination.reason: The Tobit rows are not standalone NRSV text gaps against the selected source grid. Fifty-six are beyond BibleGateway NRSVA chapter endpoints; 14:9 is covered by a merged 14:8-9 source span already represented at active 14:8.

nextActions: Review and push this Tobit source-shape classification.
